case_title: PAUL, ROBERT VS KAPLAN, DORIS DBA SIGN A RAMA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAUL, ROBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KAPLAN, DORIS DBA SIGN A RAMA KAPLAN, HARRY DBA SIGN A RAMA WAIVER OF PROOF OF SERVICE BY CO-DEFENDANTS SPOUSE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAUL, ROBERT HEARING SET FOR JAN-06-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE TO DORIS KAPLAN DBA SIGN A RAMA RETURNED TO SENDER- NO EXPLANATION; REMAILED MOTION ON 12-28-98;

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAUL, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAPLAN, DORIS DBA SIGN A RAMA KAPLAN, HARRY DBA SIGN A RAMA $510.30 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $536.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-06-1999, GRANTED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN, DORIS DBA SIGN A RAMA KAPLAN, HARRY DBA SIGN A RAMA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PAUL, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN, DORIS DBA SIGN A RAMA KAPLAN, HARRY DBA SIGN A RAMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
